Volunteer News Donate

Give directly
to the build.

Tiny Village Spirit is a Bay Area 501(c)(3) non-profit. Every dollar goes directly toward building tiny home villages for unhoused neighbors in Richmond and beyond.

Tax-deductible · 501(c)(3) · EIN 99-2684195

01

Mail a check

Make checks payable to Tiny Village Spirit and mail to:

Tiny Village Spirit
3129 Ellis Street
Berkeley, CA 94703
02

Venmo

Send a gift through our official Tiny Village Spirit charity account:

@tinyvillagespiritCA
03

ACH transfer

Wire directly to our bank account:

Routing 121102036
Account 3505601370
04

GoFundMe

Donate to the Richmond Tiny House Village, Farm & Garden campaign:

Open GoFundMe
05

Benevity

Donate through your employer's Benevity workplace giving portal. Search for:

"Tiny Village Spirit"

All gifts are tax-deductible.

Tiny Village Spirit is a registered 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. Our EIN is 99-2684195. Please retain your receipt for tax records.

Want to give your time instead?

Volunteers are building every week in Richmond. No experience needed — just show up.
